label: About
title: About The Medusa-Line Listening Arcade
short_blurb: Built from 137 recent saved-content signals, 12 inspected links, and 8 unique source objects.
body: Seed image: Habitual Line Stepper, by Shatter Hands (f4.bcbits.com). The plate borrowed low amber grazing light, blue-green glass reflections, and materials like matte black stone, brushed brass linework, and emerald enamel. Bound sources include Habitual Line Stepper, by Shatter Hands and Takashi Kokubo (小久保隆) - Blessings Of The Forest (森の恵み) (199X) [Full Album], plus 6 more.

gpt-5.5 inspected the finished plate and mapped 8 visible objects, including left illuminated Computer-life album panel, freestanding NTS Don't Assume directory pylon, and central etched forest glass facade. Outputs were written to tmp/daily-process-runs/daily-process-2026-04-26T15-00-54-582Z.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
